cards.title: Roof Repair
cards.description: For active leaks, missing shingles, flashing issues, or visible damage that needs a focused repair conversation.

cards.title: Roof Replacement
cards.description: For aging roofs, recurring problems, or homeowners comparing the cost and timing of a full replacement.

cards.description: For wind, hail, heavy rain, or sudden damage concerns that need review and next-step clarity.

cards.title: Residential Roofing
